name: Hot Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
Variation: substitute diced cooked turkey for the chicken.
Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot, except half the process cheese, half the potato chips, half the Parmesan cheese and the toasted English muffins. Cover and cook on Low for 4 to 6 hours.
Just before serving, sprinkle with remaining shredded process cheese, potato chips and grated Parmesan cheese. Serve on toasted English muffins.
Serves 6 to 8
